h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner continues to struggle with the same header-versus-value distinction, with turns that seek confirmation rather than breaking direction.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: No learner turn creates pressure that visibly forces the tutor to abandon a failed route and invent a new mechanism; the tutor offers consistent corrections and slight reframings throughout.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, and no later tutor turn adapts to a revised learner framing.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, and no later tutor turn adapts to a revised learner framing.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: No learner turn creates pressure that visibly forces the tutor to abandon a failed route and invent a new mechanism; the tutor offers consistent corrections and slight reframings throughout.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: No learner turn creates pressure that visibly forces the tutor to abandon a failed route and invent a new mechanism; the tutor offers consistent corrections and slight reframings throughout.
